subcodes.first_line: That which thou hast uttered in praise of God, the Lord of the seen and unseen, and the Lord of the Throne and of the dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرء لدی العرش ما اثنیت به الله رب ما یری و ما لایری و رب العرش و الثری و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
